allow: Bash(rm -rf components pages services hooks utils)
Bash(mkdir -p components/layout components/ui pages services context hooks utils)
Bash(node -e "import\('./config/db.js'\).then\(\(\) => { console.log\('Import OK'\); process.exit\(0\) }\).catch\(e => { console.log\('Import check:', e.message\); process.exit\(0\) }\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f\\"  {c['channelId']} | {c['title']} | {c.get\('subscriberCount','?'\)}\\"\) for c in d['data']]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f\\"Insights count: {len\(d.get\('data',[]\)\)}\\"\); [print\(f\\"  - [{i['type']}] {i['title']}\\"\) for i in d.get\('data',[]\)]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f\\"Total: {d['total']}, Showing: {len\(d['data']\)}\\"\); [print\(f\\"  - {v['title'][:60]}... | {v.get\('viewCount',0\)} views\\"\) for v in d['data'][:3]]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(list\(d.keys\(\)\)\); print\(f\\"Count: {d.get\('count','?'\)}\\"\); [print\(f\\"  - {v['title'][:60]}... | {v.get\('viewCount',0\)} views\\"\) for v in d.get\('data',d.get\('videos',[]\)\)[:3]]")
Bash(node -e "const icons = require\('lucide-react'\); const names = Object.keys\(icons\).filter\(n => /^\(Linked|Twitter|Instagram|Facebook\)/i.test\(n\)\); console.log\(names.join\('\\n'\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const icons = require\('lucide-react'\); const names = Object.keys\(icons\).filter\(n => /link|twitter|insta|social/i.test\(n\)\); console.log\(names.join\('\\n'\) || 'none'\); console.log\('---'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(icons\).filter\(n => /Globe|Share|External|Message|AtSign|Hash/i.test\(n\)\).join\('\\n'\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0,'utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('SUCCESS:', j.success\); console.log\('Posts:', j.data.posts.length\); j.data.posts.forEach\(\(p,i\) => console.log\(' ' + \(i+1\) + '. [' + p.type + '] ' + p.hook.slice\(0,60\) + '...'\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0,'utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('SUCCESS:', j.success\); console.log\('Tweets:', j.data.tweets.length\); j.data.tweets.forEach\(\(t,i\) => console.log\(' ' + \(i+1\) + '. [' + t.type + '] thread:' + t.thread.length + ' chars:' + t.tweet.length\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0,'utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('SUCCESS:', j.success\); console.log\('Items:', j.data.items.length\); j.data.items.forEach\(\(it,i\) => console.log\(' ' + \(i+1\) + '. [' + it.type + '] hashtags:' + it.hashtags.length\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0,'utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('SUCCESS:', j.success\); const p=j.data.platforms; console.log\('Platforms:', Object.keys\(p\).join\(', '\)\); console.log\('LinkedIn hook:', p.linkedin?.hook?.slice\(0,50\)\); console.log\('Twitter thread:', p.twitter?.thread?.length, 'tweets'\); console.log\('Hooks:', p.hooks?.length\)")
Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0,'utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('SUCCESS:', j.success\); console.log\('Posts:', j.data.posts.length\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0,'utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('SUCCESS:', j.success\); console.log\('Type:', j.data.improvementType\); console.log\('Suggestions:', j.data.suggestions.length\); j.data.suggestions.forEach\(\(s,i\) => console.log\(' ' + \(i+1\) + '. why: ' + s.why?.slice\(0,50\)\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0,'utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('CREATE:', j.success, 'id:', j.data?._id\)")
Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0,'utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('GET POSTS:', j.success, 'count:', j.data.length\)")
Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0,'utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('PUBLISH:', j.success, 'status:', j.data?.status, 'platformId:', j.data?.platformPostId\)")
Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0,'utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('CALENDAR:', j.success, 'events:', j.data.length\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0,'utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('CONNECT:', j.success, 'id:', j.data?._id\); const aid=j.data?._id; if\(aid\) { const http=require\('http'\); http.get\('http://localhost:5000/api/studio/accounts', r => { let b=''; r.on\('data',c=>b+=c\); r.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const a=JSON.parse\(b\); console.log\('ACCOUNTS:', a.success, 'count:', a.data.length\); const del=http.request\({hostname:'localhost',port:5000,path:'/api/studio/accounts/'+aid,method:'DELETE'}, r2=>{let b2='';r2.on\('data',c=>b2+=c\);r2.on\('end',\(\)=>console.log\('DISCONNECT:', JSON.parse\(b2\).success\)\)}\); del.end\(\) }\) }\) }")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0,'utf8'\); console.log\('Status: page loaded,', d.length, 'bytes'\); console.log\('Has title:', d.includes\('Vite + React'\)\); console.log\('Has root:', d.includes\('id=\\"root\\"'\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0,'utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('Channels:', j.data?.length\); j.data?.forEach\(c => console.log\(' ', c.channelId, c.title\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0,'utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('items:', j.items?.length\); console.log\('error:', j.error?.message\); if\(j.items?.[0]\) { const c=j.items[0].snippet?.topLevelComment?.snippet; console.log\('sample:', c?.textDisplay?.slice\(0,80\), 'by', c?.authorDisplayName\) }")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0,'utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); const uploads=j.items?.[0]?.contentDetails?.relatedPlaylists?.uploads; console.log\('Uploads playlist:', uploads\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0,'utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('Videos:', j.items?.length\); j.items?.forEach\(i => console.log\(' ', i.snippet?.resourceId?.videoId, i.snippet?.title?.slice\(0,50\)\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0,'utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('Comments:', j.items?.length\); console.log\('Error:', j.error?.message\); if\(j.items?.[0]\) { const c=j.items[0].snippet?.topLevelComment?.snippet; console.log\('Sample:', c?.textDisplay?.slice\(0,100\), 'by', c?.authorDisplayName, 'likes:', c?.likeCount\) }")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0,'utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('Success:', j.success\); console.log\('Pagination:', JSON.stringify\(j.pagination\)\); j.data?.forEach\(c => console.log\(' ', c.user?.slice\(0,20\), '|', c.sentiment, c.emotionEmoji, '| score:', c.aiScore, '| likes:', c.likeCount, '|', c.comment?.slice\(0,60\)\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0,'utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); const s=j.data?.stats; console.log\('Total:', s?.totalComments\); console.log\('Positive rate:', s?.positiveRate + '%'\); console.log\('Avg score:', s?.avgSentimentScore\); console.log\('Toxic:', s?.toxicCount, '\(' + s?.toxicRate + '%\)'\); console.log\('Sentiment:', j.data?.sentimentBreakdown?.map\(x => x.name + ':' + x.value + '%'\).join\(', '\)\); console.log\('Emotions:', j.data?.emotionBreakdown?.slice\(0,5\).map\(x => x.name + ':' + x.value + '%'\).join\(', '\)\); console.log\('Timeline points:', j.data?.commentsOverTime?.length\); console.log\('Top videos:', j.data?.topEngagedVideos?.length\); console.log\('Insights:', j.data?.insights?.length\); console.log\('Tab counts:', JSON.stringify\(j.data?.tabCounts\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0,'utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('Success:', j.success\); console.log\('Pagination:', JSON.stringify\(j.pagination\)\); j.data?.forEach\(c => console.log\(' ', c.channelName?.slice\(0,15\), '|', c.user?.slice\(0,15\), '|', c.sentiment, '|', c.comment?.slice\(0,50\)\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0,'utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('Positive filter:', j.pagination?.total, 'total'\); j.data?.forEach\(c => console.log\(' ', c.sentiment, c.emotionEmoji, c.comment?.slice\(0,60\)\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0,'utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('Search results:', j.pagination?.total\); j.data?.forEach\(c => console.log\(' ', c.user?.slice\(0,15\), '|', c.comment?.slice\(0,70\)\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0,'utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\(j.data?.count, 'comments,', j.data?.fromCache ? 'from cache' : 'fresh'\)")
